name: Policy Compliance Cross-Check
description: Compare a document, decision, or transaction against internal policy or an authority/approval matrix and produce a structured finding list of violations, gaps, and ambiguous cases — including a check that the approver's authority matched what the decision required.
author: accilium

variables.name: POLICY_TEXT
variables.description: The internal policy, SBO guideline, or delegation-of-authority matrix text the subject must comply with.
variables.example: Purchases above EUR 50,000 require dual approval by Department Head and CFO; contracts over 3 years require Legal review...

variables.name: SUBJECT
variables.description: The document, decision, transaction, or contract being checked against the policy.
variables.example: Purchase order for EUR 75,000 approved by Department Head only, no CFO signature on file

variables.name: CONTEXT
variables.description: Extra context that may affect interpretation (exceptions granted, related approvals, prior precedent).
variables.example: An emergency-procurement exception process exists but was not invoked here

example_input: POLICY_TEXT: dual approval required above EUR 50k; SUBJECT: EUR 75k PO with single approval; CONTEXT: no exception invoked
